caption.text:
Episode 1: Thecha butter 🧈 
•
Ingredients-
2tbsp Ghee
1/2 cup Peanuts
8-10pcs Green chilli
10pcs Garlic cloves
1bunch Coriander
Salt and sugar to taste
1pc Lemon juice
450gms Unsalted butter
•
#foryou #fyp #foryoupage #instafood #foodporn

caption.text:
Was missing Mutton Dum Biryani in Toronto a little too much ;)
Recipe by chef @ranveer.brar 🐐 
•
•
•
Ingredients 
Marination - 
1kg mutton
225gm curd
100gm birista (fried onions)
75gm ginger garlic paste
4 green chillies
15gm red chilli powder
15gm haldi powder
Mint, coriander, salt to taste

Biryani masala -
10gm coriander seeds
5gm Jeera
15gm black pepper
2gm choti elaichi
1gm badi elaichi
1gm clove
1gm cinnamon
4-5 bay leaf
Salt to taste

Extras -
1tbsp cream
850gm raw rice
Pinch of saffron
•
•
•
#MuttonBiryani #BiryaniLove #IndianCuisine #BiryaniLovers #MuttonLovers #SpicyFood
#IndianFoodie #Foodgasm
#InstaFood #TraditionalFood #Culinary #Gourmet
#chef #toronto #hyderabad #india #cheflife #dinner #lovefood

caption.text:
Don’t try chopping mushrooms like this at home ;)
Rosé sauce spaghetti 🍝 
•
•
•
Ingredients-
Olive oil
7-8 cloves garlic
1 onion
1 box cherry tomatoes
250ml tomato puree
Heavy cream
Mushrooms (optional)
Spaghetti 
Black pepper
Chilli flakes
Oregano
Basil
Parmesan
Ricotta ( on top )

Garlic butter-
2 whole garlic
Olive oil
Black pepper
Chilli flakes
Salt
Parmesan
•
